## Checklist

- [ ] SKILL.md has valid YAML frontmatter (name + description)
- [ ] Description is "pushy" enough to trigger reliably
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or client-identifiable information
- [ ] References directory exists if referenced in SKILL.md
- [ ] Tested by asking Claude a relevant question
